questions.question: What distinguishes a JSON-RPC notification from a request on the wire?
options: Notifications omit the id field; servers must not respond to them
Notifications use a different method namespace
Notifications are wrapped in an array
questions.explanation: Absence of id is the only marker. Servers do not respond, because there is no id to correlate against.
questions.question_zh: JSON-RPC notification 与 request 在线上格式上的区别是什么?
options_zh: jsonrpc 版本字段不同
Notification 省略 id 字段; 服务器不得对其响应
Notification 使用不同的 method 命名空间
Notification 被包成数组
questions.explanation_zh: 缺失 id 是唯一的标志。服务器不响应,因为没有 id 可关联。

questions.question: Why is newline-delimited JSON sufficient for stdio framing?
options: Because JSON does not allow literal newlines inside strings without escaping, so each object can be one line
Because UTF-8 has no newline byte
questions.explanation: json.dumps emits a single line per object; literal newlines inside strings are escaped. That makes \n a safe record separator.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 newline-delimited JSON 足以充当 stdio 的分帧?
options_zh: 因为 JSON 字符串里的字面换行必须被转义,所以每个对象可以占一行
因为管道保证换行的原子性
因为 UTF-8 没有换行字节
因为规范要求
questions.explanation_zh: json.dumps 每个对象输出一行; 字符串中的字面换行会被转义。这让 \n 成为安全的记录分隔符。

questions.question: Which error code does the transport return when JSON parsing fails?
questions.explanation: -32700 is Parse error. The response id is null because no id could be extracted.
questions.question_zh: 当 JSON 解析失败时,transport 返回哪个错误码?
questions.explanation_zh: -32700 是 Parse error。响应 id 为 null,因为无法提取 id。

questions.question: If a handler raises a plain ValueError, what does the transport return?
options: Internal error (-32603) with the exception class name in data
It does not return; the connection drops
questions.explanation: Unmapped exceptions surface as -32603. data.exception preserves the class name for the client.
questions.question_zh: 如果 handler 抛出普通的 ValueError,transport 返回什么?
options_zh: Method not found (-32601)
Invalid params (-32602)
Internal error (-32603),并在 data 中带上异常类名
不返回; 连接被断开
questions.explanation_zh: 未映射的异常以 -32603 暴露。data.exception 保留类名给客户端。

questions.question: What does the server return when a batch contains only notifications?
questions.explanation: Spec rule: if every entry is a notification, the server stays silent.
questions.question_zh: 当一批请求里全是 notification 时,服务器返回什么?
options_zh: 一个空数组
什么都不写
每个 notification 对应一个 null
单个 null 响应
questions.explanation_zh: 规范规则: 如果每一项都是 notification,服务器保持沉默。

questions.question: A line with broken JSON arrives in the middle of a session. What happens to subsequent lines?
options: They are buffered until the broken line is retried
The transport writes a -32700 response and continues reading the next line as fresh
questions.explanation: The framing layer must not poison the stream. One parse error means one error response and the loop continues.
questions.question_zh: 在会话中间收到一行格式损坏的 JSON,后续行会怎样?
options_zh: Transport 关闭流
缓存这些行,直到坏行被重试
Transport 写出 -32700 响应,并继续把后续行当作新的请求来读
全部以 -32600 拒绝
questions.explanation_zh: 分帧层不能让流被毒化。一次解析错误对应一次错误响应,循环继续。

questions.question: Why does the transport not consult the tool registry directly?
options: To keep the transport layer JSON-RPC-shaped only; the handler stitches transport to registry
Because the transport runs in a different process
questions.explanation: The transport speaks the wire. The dispatcher (next lesson) is where transport meets registry meets timeout.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 transport 不直接查询工具 registry?
options_zh: 因为 registry 是 async 的
为了让 transport 层只关心 JSON-RPC 形态; 由 handler 把 transport 与 registry 缝合
因为 registry 持有密钥
因为 transport 跑在另一个进程里
questions.explanation_zh: Transport 负责线协议。dispatcher (下一节课) 才是 transport、registry 与超时相遇的地方。
